metadata.title: Kumbú — Angola Marketplace
metadata.description: Buy and sell with confidence. Angola marketplace with in-app messaging and verified profiles.

footer.tagline: Angola marketplace — buy and sell with confidence, in the browser or the app.
footer.copyright: © {year} Kumbú. Angola marketplace — we are not a payment intermediary between individuals unless otherwise stated.

common.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.

settings.title: Settings and privacy
settings.description: Appearance, personal data, identity, and legal information.
settings.exportDescription: Download a copy of your data — profile, favorites, cart, listings, applications, orders, conversations and consents.

account.layoutDescription: Personal details, listings, purchases, and sales
account.loginPromptDescription: Sign in to access this area of your account.
account.profileLoginPrompt: Sign in to manage your profile, address, and account.
account.profileCompleteDescription: Fill in and save all fields below. Without this you cannot create listings.
account.profileCompleteBanner: Profile complete — you can now publish listings.
account.profileInfoDescription: This information appears in your purchases, sales, and messages.
account.ageVerificationNote: Required for age verification and platform safety (min. {minAge} years).
account.deliveryAddressDescription: Used for orders and deliveries on the platform.
account.dangerZoneDescription: Deleting your account records the request and ends your session. Data is marked with deleted_at.
account.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
account.sessionExpiredRelogin: Session expired. Please sign in again.
account.nameMinLength: Enter a name with at least 2 characters.
account.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (e.g. +244 9XX XXX XXX).
account.cityProvinceCountryRequired: Fill in city, province, and country.
account.photoSaveTimeout: Photo uploaded but saving the profile took too long.
account.photoSaveFailed: Could not save the photo to your profile.
account.photoUploadLong: Photo upload took too long. Check your connection and try again.
account.saveTimeout: Saving took too long. Check your backend connection and try again.
account.profileSavedComplete: Profile complete — you can now publish listings.
account.profileSavedIncomplete: Saved. To complete your profile, still missing: {missing}.
account.incompleteDescription: To publish listings, fill in all your profile details.
account.incompleteAfterSave: After saving, return here to publish your listing.
account.birthDateMinAge: You must be at least {minAge} years old to use Kumbú.
account.birthDateFuture: The date cannot be in the future.
account.birthDateVerify: Please check your date of birth.
account.incompletePublish: Complete your profile before publishing listings.
account.incompletePublishMissing: Complete your profile before publishing listings. Missing: {missing}.
account.identityIntro: Upload photos of your ID card or passport for identity verification. Files are stored privately on the server — they are not public.
account.identitySubmitSuccess: Verification request submitted. The team will review it.
account.deliveryFillRequired: Fill in address, municipality, province, and country.
account.rentalsDescription: Daily or long-term rental requests for properties. After confirmation, use chat.
account.favoritesDescription: Listings you saved to view later.
account.favoritesEmptyDescription: Tap the heart on listings to save them here.
account.jobApplicantsDescription: Review CVs, accept or reject. When accepted, chat opens with the applicant.
account.purchasesDescription: Orders you placed with other sellers on Kumbú.
account.purchasesEmptyDescription: When you buy from another user, orders appear here.
account.salesDescription: Orders received when someone buys your listings.
account.salesEmptyDescription: When someone buys your listings, orders appear here.
account.listingsDescription: Manage, edit, and feature your products on the marketplace.
account.paymentsDescription: History of premium plans (featured, VIP) for your listings.
account.applicationsDescription: Status of job applications you submitted.
account.applicationsEmptyDescription: You have not applied to any jobs yet.
account.notificationsDescription: Requests, messages, applications, and account updates.
account.loginRequiredDescription: You need to be signed in.
account.loginRequiredNotification: You need to be signed in to view this alert.
account.cvsDescription: Choose your profession, record experience, and download your CV as a branded Kumbú PDF.
account.cvsFormDescription: You can have multiple CVs and choose which to send for each application.
account.cvsLoginAlert: Sign in to the correct account before creating a CV.

confirmEmail.invalidLink: Invalid link. Confirmation token is missing.
confirmEmail.apiRequired: Email confirmation via API is only available with a configured backend.
confirmEmail.success: Email confirmed successfully. Your account is active.
confirmEmail.resendSuccess: If the account exists and is not confirmed, we sent a new link.

auth.serverError: Server error. Check your email and password (min. 8 characters).
auth.minPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.weakPassword: Choose a stronger password (at least 8 characters and 2 more criteria).
auth.resetRequestIntro: Enter your account email. We will send a secure link to create a new password.
auth.resetUpdateIntro: Set your new password. The email link has already been verified.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists with this email, we sent a link to reset your password. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.resetDevLink: SMTP inactive — use the link below to reset your password.
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can sign in with your new password.
auth.invalidResetToken: Invalid or expired link. Request a new recovery email.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.passwordWeak: Choose a stronger password (at least 8 characters and 2 more criteria).

oauth.providerNotActive: This sign-in method is not active on the server yet. Use email or contact support.
oauth.redirectMismatch: Incorrect return URL. Confirm http://localhost:3000/auth/callback in Facebook Login.
oauth.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email already has an account. Sign in with email and password or use another method.
oauth.facebookEmailMissing: Facebook did not share your email. Allow email access or use another method.
oauth.googleNetwork: The server cannot validate with Google (network). Confirm the backend is running.
oauth.facebookNotConfigured: Facebook OAuth is not configured on the backend.
oauth.sessionExpired: Login session expired or invalid response. Try again.

loginPage.heroTagline: Your account works in the app and on the web. One marketplace on any device.
loginPage.forgotSubtitle: We'll send a link to your email
loginPage.loginSubtitle: Sign in with the same account as the app
loginPage.backendOffline: Backend offline. Start Kumbu Backend on port 8080 and reload the page.
loginPage.termsRequired: Accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to continue.
loginPage.signupFlashDev: Account created. Confirm your email in profile — use the confirmation link if the email didn't arrive.
loginPage.signupFlashEmail: Account created. We sent a confirmation email — confirm in profile when you can.
loginPage.loginTimeout: The server took too long to respond. Check that the backend is running on port 8080.

emailVerification.title: Confirm your email
emailVerification.body: You can use your account normally. Confirm your email for extra security — resend the link if needed.
emailVerification.devSmtp: SMTP inactive — use the link below to confirm.
emailVerification.sent: We sent a new link. Check your email (and spam).
emailVerification.unverifiedBody: Open the link we sent or request a new one below. You can use your account while confirming.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use essential cookies for session and preferences. Optional cookies only with your consent.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: General conditions for using the Kumbú marketplace in Angola.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: How we handle your personal data on Kumbú.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: How we use cookies and similar technologies on the Kumbú site.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Quick guide to buying, selling, and applying on Kumbú.

publishingRules.title: Publishing Rules
publishingRules.intro: Required for all listings, jobs, and properties published.

errors.backendDown: Backend unavailable. Start the Spring server on port 8080 and try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Check your email and password (min. 8 characters).
errors.tryAgain: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.fetchFailed: Connection to the server failed. Make sure the backend is running (port 8080) and restart the site with npm run dev:lan if you are on mobile.
errors.smsFailed: Failed to send SMS. Please try again.
errors.otpExpired: The email link or code has expired. Request a new one or use email and password.
errors.accessDenied: Sign-in cancelled. You can try again.
errors.oauthServerError: Temporary error from the provider (Google/Facebook). Try again later.
errors.oauthClient: OAuth app not authorized. Check GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / FACEBOOK_APP_ID.
errors.redirectMismatch: Incorrect return URL. Add /auth/callback in Google/Facebook.
errors.viewConversationLogin: Sign in to view this conversation.
errors.imageTooLarge: The image is too large. Choose another or try again (we resize automatically).
errors.listingNotFoundPermission: Listing not found or no permission.

chat.noMessages: No messages in this conversation yet. Write below to get started.
chat.composerHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.loginToViewConversation: Please sign in to view this conversation.
chat.chatLoadTimeout: Chat took too long to load. Reload the page.
chat.sendTimeout: Sending took too long. Try again.
chat.multiOrdersBefore: {count} orders were created with different sellers. Arrange each one in its chat or see
chat.noConversationsDesc: Contact sellers via the Message button on listings. Orders, bookings, and applications notify you via the bell icon at the top.

cart.title: Cart
cart.subtitle: Your cart
cart.emptyDescription: Browse listings and add products. Your cart syncs with your account.
cart.multiSellerNotice: Your cart has items from {count} sellers. {count} orders will be created at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyDescription: Add products to your cart before completing your purchase.
checkout.notice: After confirming, a chat opens with the seller to arrange payment and delivery. The seller updates the order status (on the way → completed).
checkout.multiOrderNotice: {count} orders will be created (one per seller).

product.videoFormatError: Use an MP4, WebM, or MOV video.
product.selectRating: Choose a rating from 1 to 5 stars.
product.commentOrMedia: Write a comment or add a photo/video.

reviewCommentPlaceholder.general: Your comment about the product and seller…
reviewCommentPlaceholder.property: Your comment about the property and owner…
reviewCommentPlaceholder.job: Your comment about the job and employer…

reviewFormIntro.general: Share stars, a comment, and optionally photos or a video. Only after marking «I bought it» in chat or completing a purchase.
reviewFormIntro.property: Share stars and a comment. Only after a booking or confirmed deal in chat.
reviewFormIntro.job: Share stars and a comment about your experience with the employer.

reviewEmptyHint.general: Be the first to review this listing (after marking «I bought it» in chat).
reviewEmptyHint.property: Be the first to review this property (after a stay or deal in chat).
reviewEmptyHint.job: Be the first to review this job.

publish.title: Publish
publish.intro: Four quick steps — publish with photos and product details.
publish.categoriesCacheWarning: Could not refresh categories. Showing cached list.
publish.categoriesMissing: Categories missing from the database. Make sure the backend is running and migrations have been applied.
publish.noCategories: No categories available. Make sure the backend is running and catalog migrations have been applied. Reload the page.
publish.propertyHint: Properties: in the next step fill in type (house, apartment…), sale or rent price, and location.
publish.jobHint: Jobs: in the next step enter role, salary, contract, and job requirements.
publish.acceptRules: Accept the Publishing Rules to continue.
publish.completeProfile: Complete your profile in Account → Profile before publishing.
publish.addPhoto: Add at least one photo before publishing.
publish.step2Error: [Step 2 — photos] {error} Listing {productId} exists without photos. Check the console (F12) and the npm terminal.
publish.step3Error: [Step 3 — database] {error} Photos may be in Storage → listings.
publish.photoTip: Add at least one photo from your phone or computer. Listings with images get more contacts.

jobs.title: Jobs

applications.markFilled: Mark job as filled (hide from public)
applications.markFilledConfirm: Mark job as filled? It will no longer appear publicly.
applications.loadJobsError: Could not load your job listings.
applications.noJobs: You have not posted any jobs yet.

jobs.description: Jobs in Angola. Create CVs, apply, and chat after acceptance.
jobs.noActiveJobs: No active jobs match these filters.

messages.rejectApplication: Hello! Thank you for your application. We are not moving forward with your profile for this role at this time. Good luck in your job search.
messages.acceptApplication: Your application was accepted! Use this chat to arrange interview, documents, and next steps.

cvs.title: My CVs
cvs.description: Choose your profession, add experience, and download your CV as a Kumbú-branded PDF.
cvs.loginBeforeCreate: Sign in to the correct account before creating a CV.
cvs.sectionDesc: You can have multiple CVs and choose which to send for each application.

publish.benefitsPlaceholder: E.g.: Health insurance, meal allowance, training…
publish.descriptionPlaceholder: Daily tasks, schedule, team, work environment…

cv.experienceEmpty: Add companies where you worked (you can leave empty if this is your first job).
cv.stillWorking: I still work at this company
cv.descriptionPlaceholder: What you did in this role (tasks, responsibilities) *

applyPanel.filled: This job has been filled and no longer accepts applications.
applyPanel.title: Apply
applyPanel.selectCv: Choose the CV for this job
applyPanel.messagePlaceholder: Why are you applying for this job?
applyPanel.selectCvError: Select a CV or create a new one.
applyPanel.success: Application sent! The employer will review your CV.

publish.rentDailyHint: The guest picks dates; if available, they send a request and wait for your confirmation. Then chat to arrange details.

title.casa: E.g. 3-bed house in Talatona — yard and garage
title.hospedaria: E.g. Guest house 8 rooms — city center, Luanda
title.quarto: E.g. Furnished single room — monthly stay, Viana
title.terreno_vazio: E.g. 500 m² plot — titled, residential zone
title.terreno_inacabado: E.g. Plot with advanced build — 300 m², walled

description.room: House rules, Wi‑Fi, cleaning, minimum stay, what's included…
description.default: Property condition, access, nearby schools, security, condo…

rentalMessage.dailyHotel: E.g. 2 guests, check-in at 2pm, breakfast included…
rentalMessage.dailyDefault: E.g. Number of guests, arrival time, parking…
rentalMessage.longRoom: E.g. Move in October, 1 person, no pets, 6-month lease…
rentalMessage.longHotel: E.g. How many people, duration, special needs…
rentalMessage.longDefault: E.g. Move in September, family of 4, 12-month lease…

rental.ownProperty: This is your property. Manage requests in Reservations.
rental.dailyHint: Choose check-in and check-out. If nights are free, the request goes to the owner. After confirmation, chat to arrange details.
rental.occupiedHint: Some dates already have requests or confirmed bookings — they will be validated on submit.
rental.longTermHint: Send a request to the owner. After confirmation, use chat for visits, contract, and payment (outside the app, as usual in Angola).
rental.longTermSuccess: Request sent. The owner will review and confirm. Then you can chat.
rental.dailySuccess: Request sent to the owner. Wait for confirmation; then use Messages to arrange details.
rental.saleHint: Property for sale — use messages for visits and negotiation.
rental.useMessageButton: Use the Message button below to contact the owner.

listings.title: My listings
listings.description: Manage, edit, and promote your products on the marketplace.
listings.emptyDescription: Publish your first product on the marketplace.
listings.removeConfirm: Remove this listing? It will no longer appear on the marketplace.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.description: Listings you saved to view later.
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the heart on listings to save them here.
favorites.loginDescription: Your store favorites sync with your Kumbú app account.

purchases.title: My purchases
purchases.description: Orders you placed with other sellers on Kumbú.
purchases.emptyDescription: When you buy from another user, orders appear here.
purchases.loginPromptDesc: You need to be signed in.

sales.title: My sales
sales.description: Orders received when someone buys your listings.
sales.emptyDescription: When someone buys your listings, orders appear here.
sales.loginPromptDesc: You need to be signed in.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Orders, messages, applications, and account updates.

payments.title: Promotion payments
payments.description: History of premium plans (featured, VIP) for your listings.

orders.title: Your orders
orders.loginDescription: View order history and track order status.
orders.loginDetailDescription: You need to be signed in to view this order.
orders.emptyDescription: When you make a purchase, orders appear here.
orders.buyerHint: The seller updates the status. Use <link>Messages</link> to arrange delivery and payment.
orders.c2cDetail: Peer-to-peer order. Payment and delivery are arranged directly — not by Kumbú admin.

c2c.buyer: Kumbú records the order. Arrange payment and delivery in chat; the seller updates status (on the way → completed).
c2c.seller: Peer-to-peer marketplace. Update status when you agree with the buyer; payment and delivery are your responsibility.

store.sellerUnavailable: Seller not available on this listing.
store.messageTimeout: Request took too long. Check your connection and try again.

seller.title: Seller
seller.notFoundDesc: This user does not exist or was removed.
seller.activeListings: {count, plural, one {# active listing} other {# active listings}}
seller.noListingsTitle: This seller has no listings yet
seller.noListingsDesc: When they publish, listings appear here.

monetization.apiRequired: Promotion payments are available with the backend API active.
monetization.emptyDescription: You have not started any featured or VIP payments yet.
monetization.promoteDescription: Choose a premium plan and submit payment proof.
monetization.apiRequired: Monetization available only with backend API.
monetization.monetizationInactive: Monetization is not yet active on the platform.
monetization.proofSubmittedNotice: Proof submitted. Await confirmation from the Kumbú team.

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Contact us
support.contactDescription: Use the support chat for automatic FAQ or to talk to our team. Only administrators can suspend accounts — use «Report» on suspicious listings or profiles.
support.legalInfoDesc: Terms, privacy, cookies, and publishing rules.
support.reportContentDesc: Use the «Report» button on a listing or user profile. For legal emergencies, mention it in the support email.

notifications.emptyDescription: Rental requests, messages, applications and reviews on your listings appear here.
notifications.useMessagesBefore: To talk to buyers or applicants, use

header.searchPrompt: What are you looking for today?

home.noListingsFound: No listings found. Try another search.

search.title: Search
search.typeToSearchProduct: Type a product name to search.

onboarding.heroTitle: Everything you need in one place
onboarding.heroBody: Buy, sell, apply, and chat with confidence.
onboarding.slide1Body: Discover products, services, and local businesses on the marketplace built for Angola.
onboarding.slide2Body: Photos, price, and location. Buyers message you in the app.
onboarding.slide3Body: The same login in the app and on the site — always in sync.

titleBySub.eletronicos_telefones: E.g.: Samsung Galaxy A54 — 128 GB, good battery
titleBySub.eletronicos_computadores: E.g.: HP 15" laptop — Intel i5, 8 GB RAM, 256 GB SSD
titleBySub.eletronicos_tablets: E.g.: iPad 10th gen — 64 GB, with case
titleBySub.eletronicos_tv-audio: E.g.: Samsung Smart TV 55" 4K — with remote and mount
titleBySub.eletronicos_acessorios: E.g.: JBL Bluetooth earphones — lightly used
titleBySub.moda_roupas: E.g.: Party dress size M — worn once
titleBySub.moda_sapatos: E.g.: Nike trainers size 42 — like new
titleBySub.eletrodomesticos_cozinha: E.g.: Samsung 20 L microwave — works well
titleBySub.eletrodomesticos_lavagem: E.g.: 8 kg washing machine — few years old
titleBySub.eletrodomesticos_climatizacao: E.g.: 12000 BTU air conditioner — with installation
titleBySub.eletrodomesticos_outros: E.g.: Philips steam iron — new in box
titleBySub.beleza_maquilhagem: E.g.: MAC makeup kit — lightly used
titleBySub.beleza_perfumes: E.g.: Imported perfume 100 ml — with box
titleBySub.moveis_sala: E.g.: 3-seater sofa — grey fabric, good condition
titleBySub.moveis_quarto: E.g.: Double bed + mattress — solid wood
titleBySub.carros_comerciais: E.g.: Hiace 2017 — 15 seats, good for transport
titleBySub.carros_motas: E.g.: Honda PCX 125 — 2021, papers in order
titleBySub.desporto_outros: E.g.: Wilson tennis racket — with cover
titleBySub.servicos_reparacao: E.g.: Phone and tablet repair — Luanda
titleBySub.servicos_transporte: E.g.: Removals and deliveries — 3.5 t truck
titleBySub.servicos_educacao: E.g.: English lessons — in person or online

titleByCategory.eletronicos: E.g.: Brand, model and condition of the device
titleByCategory.moda: E.g.: Item, size and condition (e.g.: jacket M, good condition)
titleByCategory.eletrodomesticos: E.g.: Brand, model and condition of the appliance
titleByCategory.moveis: E.g.: Furniture type, material and approximate dimensions
titleByCategory.carros: E.g.: Brand, model, year and kilometres
titleByCategory.servicos: E.g.: Clear service name and service area
titleByCategory.default: E.g.: Describe the item with brand, model and condition

descriptionBySub.eletronicos_telefones: Battery, accessories included, warranty, delivery or pickup…
descriptionBySub.eletronicos_tv-audio: Accessories (remote, cables), year of purchase, delivery, negotiation…
descriptionBySub.carros_ligeiros: History, servicing, accidents, paperwork, test drive…

descriptionByCategory.eletronicos: Warranty, invoice, delivery, exchange or negotiation…
descriptionByCategory.servicos: Hours, hourly rate or package, area covered…
